questionHtml: Draw the Lewis structures of oxygen, O2, and ozone, O3.
markschemeHtml:
NOTES: Coordinate bond may be represented by an arrow.

Do not accept delocalized structure for ozone.

meta.title: Draw the Lewis structures of oxygen, O2, and ozone, O3.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure
Structure 2.2.11—Resonance structures occur when there is more than one possible position for a double bond in a molecule. Deduce resonance structures of molecules and ions.
